rows.label: tlk70000057_04_msg0001
rows.name:
Auntie Rynea has really pretty
hair. And it smells good, too!

rows.label: tlk70000057_04_msg0002
rows.name:
She uses flower oil and
good-smelling water to
make her hair all shiny.

rows.label: tlk70000057_04_msg0003
rows.name:
Mamma says I mustn't copy her,
but she never said how come...

rows.label: tlk70000057_04_msg0004
rows.name:
Grown-ups always tell you what
you can't do. I don't ever want
to become like that.
